violations.text: Establishment did not have a way to properly sanitize at time of inspection (no sanitizer on site/hot water not available for high temp sanitizing). Proper methods for sanitizing equipment were reviewed with person-in-charge. No food service planned in kitchen in near future, person-in-charge to obtain sanitizer and proper test stripes prior to next use of kitchen and equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

There was no hot water available at time of inspection due to a malfunctioning hot water heater (per the PIC). Hot water generation and distribution systems shall be sufficient to meet the peak hot water demands throughout the FOOD ESTABLISHMENT. Per the PIC, technician was called for service/repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
